name: Jack Daniels Rib Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Brush ribs with the glaze, coating them evenly.
3. Place the ribs on the grill.
4. Continue to baste the ribs with the glaze when turning them.
5. Makes enough glaze for 2 racks of ribs, each containing 7 to 10 ribs.
6. Also great for chicken wings.
